hero.title: Cinque Terre
hero.subtitle: A journey through the five colorful villages suspended between sea and sky. Discover the Italian Riviera's most romantic destination.

villageSelector.title: The Five Villages
villageSelector.subtitle: Each village has its own unique personality. Find the one that speaks to you.

about.title: We help you discover the real Cinque Terre.
description: Cinque Terre Dispatch is your premium guide to the Italian Riviera's most iconic coastline. We go beyond the postcards to bring you authentic stories, hidden gems, and practical advice from locals and experts.
Whether you're planning a romantic getaway, a hiking adventure, or a culinary tour, we're here to ensure your trip is unforgettable.

newsletter.title: Get the Cinque Terre Dispatch
newsletter.subtitle: Weekly tips, hidden gems, and travel inspiration delivered straight to your inbox. No spam, ever.
